title: cynoglossum amplifolium var. amplifolium
intro: Cynoglossum amplifolium var. amplifolium, also known as the large-flowered hound's tongue or wolf's tongue, is a perennial herb belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Cynoglossum amplifolium var. amplifolium include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
